result.headline: Astrology reads VIX as favorable
result.subline: Sagittarius colors the reading; market pulse remains strong_uptrend.
result.short_reading: The mock astrology reading intentionally mixes market pulse with engine-specific artifact signals for frontend contrast.
result.long_reading: This deterministic mock is not a forecast. It is designed to make cards diverge visually while preserving the same schema as real LLM output.
